title: Fair-Use Cache Keys, TTL, Clock Injection, Copies, and Eviction · Runtime Contract: Pokedex Go Cache Capacity Evidence
summary: The cache keys raw commands, uses time.Now deep inside methods, returns mutable shared slices, never expires failures, and grows without a capacity policy. Predict the user decision, Go ownership, command state, API contract, resource budget, failure, and observable evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the pokedex go cache capacity evidence increment in bounded TTL resource cache with observable decisions. Learners progress through prediction, explicit…
objectives: Bound entries and bytes, define eviction, expose hit, miss, stale, eviction, and bypass counters, and test each transition.
Decide which not-found, transient, malformed, and canceled outcomes may be cached and for how long.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
